question_text: Which of the following is/are undecidable?

options.A: Given two Turing machines M1 and M2, decide if L(M1) = L(M2).
options.B: Given a Turing machine M, decide if L(M) is regular.
options.C: Given a Turing machine M, decide if M accepts all strings.
options.D: Given a Turing machine M, decide if M takes more than 1073 steps on every string.
